title: Recommendation: publish generated release notes with spot review
summary: Generated release notes cover most changes, so the team should publish them faster and rely on spot review for sensitive items.

claims.text: Generated notes cover most merged changes.
Customers prefer concise notes over exhaustive manual changelogs.
Engineers do not want to maintain a second changelog.

openQuestions: How often should reviewers sample generated notes?
Which customers need extra release detail?
recommendation: Publish generated release notes after a lightweight spot review.
